productDisplayName: Hanes Men Sleeveless Crew Grey Innerwear T-shirt
description: Composition Grey sleeveless T-shirt made of ComfortSoft 100% combed cotton, has navy blue panel detailing and red piping on the sides and a lay flat collar with a round neck Fit Muscle fit Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Revel in the luxurious comfort of a combed cotton fabric in this sleeveless T-shirt from hanes. Engineered with ComfortFit technology, this tee will contour your body perfectly, stretch to your ease and retain shape wash after wash. The lay flat collar offers superior comfort and a flattering fit, while the contrast coloured side panels oozes sporty attitude. And what's even better is that this T-shirt comes with a printed brand label on the inner neck - so bid goodbye to those scratchy labels and welcome comfort at its best! Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
